summary: Iter61 — WhatsApp click-to-chat feature (wa.me links, no WhatsApp Business API). All 5 backend endpoints + all 4 frontend UI surfaces PASSED end-to-end. Backend: 10/10 pytest in test_iter61_whatsapp.py — cs-whatsapp (AI+deterministic fallback, phone digits only, used_ai flag), payment-reminder (wa_text + client_phone alongside subject/body_html), invoice-whatsapp (invoice/receipt doc_type toggle, share_token persists across repeat calls), public/finance-doc/{token} (200 valid PDF %PDF signature 500+ bytes with NO auth header, 404 on invalid token), finance whatsapp-reminder (200 with outstanding balance / 400 when fully paid). Frontend: CS tab → cs-whatsapp button (used AI, produced 245-char message, href=https://wa.me/9601843090?text=Hi%20Naeema...) → modal, copy-btn, open-btn all working. Clients tab → client card → expand billing project → Reminder → reminder-whatsapp button enabled, opens WA modal with 306-char Projexino reminder text with 'outstanding' keyword + phone-prefilled wa.me href. Finance page → project (Demo Web Build, 7 invoices) → Invoices tab → 7 inv-wa buttons visible → modal opens with '*Demo Web Build Invoice for May 2026*' subject-line + INR amount + wa.me href → wa-doctype-receipt toggle updates message to 'Receipt for'; wa-doctype-invoice restores 'Invoice for'; copy-btn present; whatsapp-download-url shows /api/public/finance-doc/{token}. Preview modal → preview-whatsapp button opens WA modal. Payments tab → whatsapp-reminder-btn (visible only when remaining>0) opens WA modal with 'outstanding' text + wa.me href. Regression: inv-pdf buttons still render (7/7). Login flow works.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend clients_module.cs_whatsapp line 402-426: swallowing ALL exceptions from ai_provider.chat_completion silently in a bare 'except Exception: pass' — this hides genuine AI/network failures from ops. Consider logging.warning('cs_whatsapp AI fallback used, reason=%s', e) so failures are observable. Currently used_ai=false is the only signal, and it looks identical to 'AI not configured'.

Backend finance.invoice_whatsapp line 1465: doc_type inference uses `inv.get('status') == 'paid'` — this is fine, but when doc_type is auto-inferred (empty payload), the response returns the inferred value in `doc_type`. Frontend toggle initial-state should sync with this returned value — I confirmed InvoicesPane.openWa passes an explicit doc_type on toggle, so no bug, just double-check that the initial open() call also passes an explicit doc_type or reads the returned one to avoid brief mismatch on paid invoices.

Backend finance.public_finance_doc line 1491: no rate limiting, no expiry check on share_token. share_created_at is stored (line 1463) but never validated. Consider adding a max-age (e.g. 90 days) before returning the PDF to reduce blast radius if a link leaks. LOW priority — current impl is functionally correct.

Backend finance.py:1499 fetches project_finance with {_id:0, documents:0} but doesn't handle missing finance record → passes empty dict to _build_invoice_pdf which may crash on missing keys. Verified today's PDFs render fine because seed data is complete, but add a 404 fallback if finance is None and pdf_base64 is missing.

Frontend WhatsAppSendModal.jsx line 39: `whatsapp-message-input` is a textarea (uncontrolled after initial mount via `text` prop + onTextChange). If a stale ref is passed while doc_type toggle re-triggers openWa, the textarea state could briefly show old text. Verified visually — works correctly today because openWa passes fresh text via setWa. No action.

Frontend ClientsHub CustomerSuccess.openWhatsApp (~line 700-800): passes waBusy state around the button; if the API takes 15s (AI path) there's no loading indicator on the button beyond disabled state. Consider adding a spinner icon on cs-whatsapp when waBusy=true for UX clarity.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 4 WhatsApp surfaces verified end-to-end: CS, Reminder, Finance Invoice + doc-type toggle, Finance Payments; regression inv-pdf still renders)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Tests use existing invoices (finance project 57419353-a008-4582-af6e-c6511d28c126 has 7 invoices) and existing client naeema (b5424870a18d435b8fb10be8b8b65593) with pending billing project (ifeelincolor App, $10K outstanding, phone 9601843090).
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp feature is stable & complete. Notable env facts: (1) hardcoded FINANCE_PROJECT_ID in problem statement `387ed69e88ef41e08aa4b360609e91c6` (ifeelincolor App) has 0 invoices in this environment — use Demo Web Build (57419353-a008-4582-af6e-c6511d28c126) which has 7 invoices instead for UI tests. (2) The finance whatsapp-reminder test iterates across all finance projects to find one with outstanding balance since paid amounts vary. (3) cs-whatsapp AI call takes 5-15s — set timeouts >= 25s on waits. (4) Gmail OAuth is broken (expected). (5) The 2 remaining CDN refs from iter60 are still intentional — do NOT flag. Retain test_iter61_whatsapp.py in regression rotation.
rca of the issue: N/A — feature-verification pass; no bugs found.
